plan_metadata.name: Sample Data Analyst Agent Remote Debug

steps.description: Type text 'data-analyst-agent' into the "Search" input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button next to the "Data Visualization" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit Samples panel within Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:data-analyst-agent-v2}} into the run time variable.
Press the Escape (Esc) key to close the "Notifications" panel in the Visual Studio Code interface while using the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
